title: esenbeckia decidua
intro: Esenbeckia decidua, also known as Pusilla or Yellow Flower, is a shrub-like plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Esenbeckia decidua can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments.
